message:
Add provider tool name mapping per spec Section 3

ToolDefinitions() now applies canonical→provider-specific name mapping:
- OpenAI: shell→exec_command, grep→grep_files, glob→list_dir
- Gemini: shell→run_shell_command, grep→grep_search, list_dir→list_directory
- Anthropic: no mapping (uses canonical names)

Session reverse-maps provider names from LLM responses back to canonical
names for registry lookup. Events and tool results use canonical names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
